name: Full Corpus Appendix — Milestone Route
description: Prerequisite route for Full Corpus Appendix, segmented into milestone episodes by the progression-router planner. Each phase closes on a quest/unlock capstone rather than an arbitrary skill number.

steps.detail: Chickens in Lumbridge. No food needed, fast kills.
Cows east of Lumbridge or goblins. Drop bones for Prayer XP.
Barbarians south of Edgeville. Equips steel weapons.
Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers (Stronghold). Equips dragon weapons.
Moss Giants, Blue Dragons, or Slayer tasks. Equips whip.
Chickens in Lumbridge.
Cows or goblins near Lumbridge.
Barbarians. Significant damage boost.
Hill Giants or Flesh Crawlers. Unlocks rune scimitar use.
Moss Giants or Slayer. Unlocks barrows equipment access stat-wise.
Chickens or crabs. Passive Defence XP from combat.
Goblins or cows.
Barbarians or Stronghold. Unlocks rune armour.
Flesh Crawlers or Slayer tasks. Unlocks dragon and barrows armour.
Slayer or NMZ.
NMZ AFK.
Hitpoints trains passively during combat. 1.33 XP per damage dealt.
Accumulates during all combat training milestones.
Chickens and cows with shortbow. Cheap feathered arrows.
Ogresses or Experiments. Equips green dragonhide.
Seagulls at Port Sarim or Chinchompas. Equips maple shortbow.
Cannon tasks for fast Ranged XP. Unlocks black dragonhide.
Chinchompas at Ape Atoll or MM2 tunnels for best XP rate.
Bury regular bones. Unlocks Protect Item prayer.
Bury big bones or use guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Melee.
Dragon bones on guilded altar. Unlocks Protect from Missiles.
Wyvern/Dragon bones on altar. Unlocks Piety (requires quests).
Air Bolt and low alchemy. Unlocks Camelot Teleport.
Superheat or Curse spells. Unlocks Superheat for Smithing XP.
High Alchemy on stackable items. Core money maker.
Alching or Bursting at Crabs. Unlocks Ice Barrage prerequisite path.
Ancient Magicks Bursting/Barraging. Requires Desert Treasure.
Cook shrimps and anchovies. Use range to avoid burning.
Cook trout and salmon from Barbarian Village fishing spots.
Cook lobsters. Stop burning at 74 with cooking gauntlets.
Swordfish or sharks. Use cooking gauntlets for faster success rate.
Karambwans (1-tick) or wines for fastest XP. Karambwans require Tai Bwo Wannai Trio.
Regular trees near Lumbridge or Varrock. Use iron axe.
Oak trees. Bank in Draynor or drop logs.
Willow trees at Draynor Village. Near bank for convenient banking.
Maple trees at Seers' Village or Corsair Cove. Higher XP rate.
Yew trees in Woodcutting Guild or Edgeville. Profitable logs.
Redwood in Woodcutting Guild (requires 90) or Magic trees for profit.
Whittle and fletch arrow shafts from logs.
Fletch oak shortbows (u). Buy logs from GE.
Maple logs into maple longbows. String for additional XP and profit.
Yew shortbows (u). Fast XP, low cost per action.
Dragon darts or Magic longbow strings for fast XP. Dragon darts require RFD subquest.
Shrimps and anchovies at Draynor or Lumbridge Swamp.
Trout and salmon at Barbarian Village. Bank nearby.
Lobsters at Karamja or Catherby. Stocking food for combat.
Swordfish at Catherby or AFK Barb Fishing for simultaneous Str/Agil XP.
Normal logs from any tree. Light fires in a row.
Oak logs from GE or Draynor oaks.
Maple logs — good balance of XP/cost. Required for Desert Treasure.
Yew or magic logs. Unlocks Wintertodt minigame at 50 FM threshold.
Wintertodt — best XP/hr, fire-making supply crates, smithing/herblore/farming/fletching crate rewards.
Leather gloves and boots. Buy hides from GE.
Gold amulets (u) or sapphire rings for decent XP.
Green dragonhide bodies for fast XP. Buy from GE.
Blue/red dragonhide bodies for faster XP, higher material cost.
Black dragonhide bodies (best BIS XP/gp ratio) or unpowered orbs via glassblowing.
Bronze bars at Lumbridge furnace. Smelt then smith.
Iron bars. Buy from GE or mine in Al-Kharid mines.
Steel bars. Consider Superheat for simultaneous Magic XP.
Gold bars with Goldsmith gauntlets (Family Crest quest) for fast XP.
Blast Furnace mithril/adamant for best XP/gp ratio.
Blast Furnace rune bars — profit while training. Best GP/hr smithing method.
Copper and tin in Lumbridge mines.
Iron ore in Al-Kharid mine or Dwarven Mine. Drop ore for fast XP.
Iron ore 3-tick Granite once unlocked, or regular iron ore drop-mining.
3-tick Granite in Kharidian Desert quarry for fast XP (requires waterskins/humidify).
Motherload Mine for passive gold nugget accumulation and equipment upgrades.
3-tick Granite for fastest XP or Blast Mine for profit.
Clean grimy guam leaves. Requires Druidic Ritual quest.
Make attack, strength, or stat-restore potions. Buy secondaries from GE.
Super restore or prayer potions. Used heavily in bossing.
Super combat potions at 90 or anti-fire potions at 69.
Stamina potions, ranging potions, or divine potions for end-game. GP intensive.
Gnome Stronghold course. No fail rate, steady XP.
Gnome Stronghold then Draynor Village Agility course.
Varrock Agility course. Unlocks graceful shortcut uses.
Canifis Rooftop Course. Highest marks/hr early-mid game.
Falador or Seers' Rooftop. Unlock shortcut network for efficient traversal.
Ardougne Rooftop (best marks) or Werewolf Course. Graceful recolor at 260 marks.
Ardougne Rooftop or Hallowed Sepulchre for best XP and loot.
Pickpocket men and women in Lumbridge or Edgeville.
Pickpocket HAM members in Lumbridge. Gems and clue scrolls.
Fruit stalls on Zeah or Guards in Ardougne.
Blackjack Menaphite thugs in Pollnivneach. Best XP/hr method, requires Desert Treasure area access.
Blackjack Menaphite thugs or Master Farmers at 38+ for seeds.
Slayer tasks from Turael (Burthorpe). Low-level monsters, easy tasks.
Tasks from Mazchna (Morytania requires Priest in Peril) or Vannaka.
Desert-region Slayer monsters. Kalphites, desert lizards, etc.
Duradel or Nieve assignments. Abyssal demons, blue dragons, fire giants.
Bloodvelds, gargoyles, abyssal demons. Excellent GP + XP combination.
High-value tasks: Hydra (82), Cerberus (91), Thermonuclear Smoke Devil (93).
Plant potato, onion, and cabbage allotments. Use compost.
Oak and willow saplings for tree patches. Trees give large XP dumps.
Maple trees, watermelons, herb patches every 80 minutes.
Yew trees and ranarr/snapdragon herbs. Significant profit.
Magic/elder trees and dragonfruit/torstol herbs. Highly profitable, 2hr cycle.
Air runes via Lumbridge Swamp altar. Unlocks lava runes method.
Cosmic runes on Zanaris (requires Lost City quest). Unlocks double cosmic runes.
Nature runes on Karamja. Unlocks double nats at 91.
Lava runes with Ring of Dueling. Best XP/hr for Runecraft, low profit.
Wrath runes (90+) or Lava runes with lunar spell. Raiments of the Eye for bonus output.
Crimson Swifts at Feldip Hills with bird snares.
Tropical Wagtails at Feldip Hills. Two traps at level 20.
Swamp Lizards or Barb-tailed Kebbits. Shift to box traps.
Chinchompas at the Piscatoris Hunter Area. Good XP and GP.
Red chinchompas at Feldip Hills or Maniacal Monkeys post-MM2 for best XP.
Crude wooden chairs and rugs. Buy planks from GE.
Oak chairs or larder. Oak planks give best XP/plank ratio at this tier.
Oak dungeon doors or oak larder. Each action ~56 XP.
Teak or mahogany furniture. Mahogany tables at 52 for fast AFK XP.
Mahogany homes or mahogany tables for best XP. GP intensive.

steps.instruction: Train Attack/Strength at Stronghold of Security
steps.detail: Flesh Crawlers and Zombies offer fast melee XP with no food cost at mid levels.
Best melee XP in the game until very high levels. Requires Monkey Madness I completion.
AFK melee training using quest bosses. Requires several quests completed.
Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves and NMZ bosses.
Grants access to Ape Atoll and Maniacal Monkey tunnels.
Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.
Semi-consistent GP and gear. Entry-level bossing in Morytania.
Unlocks Morytania region access. Required before Barrows and Slayer tasks there.
Requires 60 Strength to enter. High-tier drops including Godswords.
Requires strong all-round stats. Most valuable loot table in the game.

steps.instruction: Complete Tale of the Righteous (Zeah intro)
steps.detail: One of several quests enabling full Zeah access and CoX entry.
Grants Cooking gauntlets (stop burning food) and Goldsmith gauntlets (Smithing XP boost).
Required to train Herblore. Short quest, no stat requirements.
Unlocks Zanaris and cosmic rune altar. Grants access to dragon weaponry.
Unlocks blackjacking in Pollnivneach for fast Thieving XP.
Unlocks 1-tick Karambwan cooking for fast Cooking XP.
Plant potato, onion, or cabbage allotments; collect produce. Check at natural banking breaks — do not interrupt active training.
Slayer tasks or Nightmare Zone AFK. Major accuracy gain.
Nightmare Zone or Maniacal Monkeys for max melee.
NMZ AFK for efficient Str gains.
Maniacal Monkeys best-in-game Str XP.
Barbarian Fishing 3-tick for best XP or Infernal Harpoon anglerfish.
